forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a high near 69. Southwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 11pm. Mostly cloudy. Low around 45, with temperatures rising to around 49 overnight. West wind 2 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
